title: Throwable Creepers
description: Throwable Creepers are new mobs that can be made through cauldron and Can be used to Fighting Mobs, Defending your base and  even pranking your friends!
body:
## Throwable Creepers
Throwable Creepers are new mobs that can be used as throwable explosions to fight mobs, defending bases and even pranking your friends! 

### Spawning
Throwable Creepers are new mobs that can be spawned using cauldron(filled with water), glistering melon, moss block, gunpowder and creeper head.

### Usage
To launch the creeper after spawning it, grab flint and steel, ignite its head, and then crouch while striking it to initiate the launch.


![throwable creeper demostrastion](https://s6.gifyu.com/images/S6jiI.gif)
